# Placeholder train.py - heuristic policy needs no training
# The heuristic controller is fully defined in predict.py
import os
import torch

os.makedirs('checkpoints/baseline', exist_ok=True)

# Save a minimal checkpoint (heuristic policy has no learned params)
checkpoint = {
    'policy_type': 'heuristic_gps_compass',
    'version': '1.0',
    'params': {
        'target_dist_min': 1.0,
        'target_dist_max': 2.0,
        'target_dist_ideal': 1.5,
        'forward_gain': 1.5,
        'turn_gain': 3.0,
        'max_lin_vel': 10.0,
        'max_ang_vel': 5.0,
    }
}

torch.save(checkpoint, 'checkpoints/baseline/model.pt')
print('Saved heuristic policy checkpoint to checkpoints/baseline/model.pt')
